name: Melodic Makeout
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: With [TargetName]'s willpower waning, [AttackerName] closes the distance between the two of them with a twirling, eye-catching, hip-swinging step before pressing her hefty bust against [TargetHisOrHer] chest as she pulls [TargetHimOrHer] into a deep kiss, the sensual sounds of their makeout erotically echoing into [TargetHisOrHer] ears as she lovingly entangles tongues with him, as though she were smooching [TargetHimOrHer] from all sides!
miss: With [TargetName]'s willpower waning, [AttackerName] closes the distance between the two of them with a twirling, eye-catching, hip-swinging step before pressing her hefty bust against [TargetHisOrHer] chest, but [TargetName] manages to keep [TargetHimOrHer]self together and push her away!
statusOutcome: In an instant, [TargetName] can feel the tingling pleasure of the succubus' languorous lip-locking permeate [TargetHisOrHer] entire head as a result of her combined aural and oral assault, flooding [TargetHimOrHer] with dizzying charmed euphoria as both [TargetHisOrHer] mouth and ears are getting lavished with warm cooing attention...
